title: Sindri Extension Manifest
description: Schema for a Sindri extension manifest.json file.

id.description: Globally unique extension identifier in 'publisher.name' dot-notation. Example: 'sindri.aurora-theme'

name.description: Human-readable extension name shown in the marketplace. Example: 'Sindri Aurora'

version.description: Semantic version of this manifest. Must match a git tag in the extension repository. Example: '1.0.0'

publisher.description: Publisher identifier — matches the prefix of 'id'. Example: 'sindri'

description.description: One-sentence description shown in the marketplace card.

categories.description: Marketplace browsing facets. An extension may belong to multiple categories.

items.description: Color Theme — UI palette (ThemeDef JSON); File Icon Theme — file tree icons; UI Icon Theme — activity bar / toolbar glyphs; Language Support — Tree-sitter grammar + LSP/DAP adapters; Language Pack — human-language UI localisation; Test & Task Adapter — test runner / task adapter; UI Extension — workbench panels, status bar items, editor decorations (requires extension host); Extension Pack — installs a curated set of extensions together; Icon Theme Base — shared icon templates inherited by child icon themes via `extends`

permissions.description: sindri.* API namespaces this extension may call (ADR-0015 §6). Empty array for data-only extensions (themes, icons). Example: ['sindri.workspace', 'sindri.terminal']

engines.description: Minimum Sindri version this extension is compatible with.

sindri.description: Semver range. Use '>=0.1.0' for extensions compatible with all 0.x releases. Example: '>=0.2.0'

contributes.description: What this extension provides. All fields are optional; include only what applies.

themes.description: Colour theme definitions (data-only, no extension host required).

kind.description: Controls which CSS variable set is applied.

path.description: Path to the ThemeDef JSON file, relative to this extension folder. Example: 'aurora-dark.json'

uiIconPacks.description: UI icon pack definitions — activity bar and toolbar glyphs (data-only, no extension host required).

path.description: Path to the UiIconPackDef JSON file.

iconThemes.description: File icon theme definitions (data-only, no extension host required).

kind.description: 'color' — full-colour SVG icons; 'mono' — uses currentColor, respects the theme accent.

path.description: Path to the IconThemeDef JSON file.

lsp.description: Language Server Protocol adapters (requires extension host).

dap.description: Debug Adapter Protocol adapters (requires extension host).

grammars.description: Tree-sitter / Lezer grammar files (requires extension host).

treeViews.description: Tree-view panels contributed by this extension (ADR-0026 Tier 1). Each entry declares a panel that the extension host will register when sindri.ui.registerTreeView(id, …) is called from activate().

id.description: Tree-view identifier — passed to sindri.ui.registerTreeView. Must be unique within the extension. Example: 'my-ext.my-tree'

title.description: Panel title shown in the dock tab. Example: 'My Tree'

icon.description: Path to the SVG icon file, relative to the extension folder. Example: 'icons/panel.svg'. Defaults to a generic list icon.

defaultDock.description: Which dock region the panel initially appears in. Defaults to 'left-top'.

webviewPanels.description: Webview panels contributed by this extension (ADR-0026 Tier 2). Each entry declares a panel backed by a null-origin iframe; the extension returns the full HTML from provider.getHtml().

id.description: Panel identifier — passed to sindri.ui.registerWebviewPanel. Must be unique within the extension. Example: 'my-ext.my-panel'

title.description: Panel title shown in the dock tab. Example: 'My Panel'

icon.description: Path to the SVG icon file, relative to the extension folder. Example: 'icons/panel.svg'. Defaults to a generic panel icon.

defaultDock.description: Which dock region the panel initially appears in. Defaults to 'right-top'.

editors.description: Custom editor registrations (ADR-0028 Surface B). Each entry declares a file-type selector; the extension calls sindri.editor.registerEditor(id, provider) from activate().

id.description: Editor identifier — passed to sindri.editor.registerEditor. Example: 'my-ext.my-editor'

displayName.description: Name shown in the 'Open with…' picker. Example: 'Markdown Preview'

selector.description: File patterns this editor handles. At least one must match for the editor to be offered.

filenamePattern.description: Glob pattern matched against the file name (not full path). Example: '*.md'

configuration.description: Settings schema contributed to the Settings panel (ADR-0021). Keys are setting identifiers.

main.description: Entry-point bundle path for code-bearing extensions (requires extension host). Omit entirely for data-only extensions (themes, icons). Example: 'dist/extension.js'

extensionPack.description: Extension IDs bundled by this Extension Pack. Installing the pack installs each listed extension individually.

tags.description: Optional search tags shown in the marketplace. Lowercase, hyphen-separated. Example: ['dark', 'purple']

extends.description: ID of a base extension this one inherits from (ADR-0032). The runtime merges the base icons.json (child-wins on field conflicts) and injects `variables` as CSS custom properties at activation. Only valid for icon theme extensions.

variables.description: Palette overrides passed to the base extension (requires 'extends', ADR-0032). Keys map to CSS custom property names injected at activation (e.g. 'folder-base' → '--folder-base'); values are CSS color strings.

license.description: SPDX license identifier for this extension's own license. Example: 'AGPL-3.0-only', 'MIT', 'Apache-2.0'

credits.description: Third-party assets included in this extension that require attribution. Displayed in the extension detail panel under 'Credits & Licenses'.

name.description: Name of the credited work or project. Example: 'Phosphor Icons'

url.description: URL to the source project or license text.

notice.description: Copyright or attribution notice text. Example: 'Copyright (c) 2020 Phosphor Icons'
